# Grammar and Vocabulary Test

iMocha’s grammar and vocabulary test enables recruiters and hiring managers to hire a job-fit candidate within a short period & make unbiased decisions. This test is useful for hiring Entry-Level Executives, Graduates, and Office Staff. Our customers have reported up to a 40% reduction in hiring costs.

## Grammar and Vocabulary Test Assessment

English grammar is the structure of expressions in the English language. This includes the structure of words, phrases, clauses, and sentences. It covers parts of speech, helping verbs, and English tenses. Parts of speech include nouns, pronouns, adverbs, prepositions, adjectives, etc.

English grammar is the basic building block of the English language. Vocabulary is the other building block of any language. For any manager to lead a team of subordinates and communicate with vendors, customers, and other stakeholders, an excellent command of the English language is a must. The manager needs to be a very good and able communicator. This test is specially designed to check the grammar and vocabulary of a candidate.

Blue hollow ring shape above and to the left of a solid orange circle on a white background.

How it works

### Test Summary

This grammar test may contain MCQs (Multiple Choice Questions), MAQs (Multiple Answer Questions), Fill in the Blanks, Descriptive Questions, Whiteboard Questions, Audio / Video Questions, AI-LogicBox, Job-based Simulations, True or False Questions, etc. 
 
Our vocabulary test is designed considering EEOC guidelines, and all the security measures have been taken to allow you to assess & hire diverse talent without bias.

Useful for hiring 

* Entry Level Executives and Graduates
* Office Staff

### Sentence Correction

iMocha’s grammar and vocabulary test helps recruiters evaluate a candidate’s ability to correct sentences using proper grammar rules.

### Selecting Words

This grammar test evaluates applicants’ ability to solve fill-in-the-blank type questions to make a sentence meaningful.

Shuffle

### Ordering of Words

Our test helps to assess a candidate’s ability to order words to make a sentence meaningful.

Shuffle

### Antonyms and Synonyms

This test helps to assess a candidate’s knowledge of English vocabulary for finding antonyms and synonyms for a word.

Shuffle

Shuffle
